verbGlossary.ACHIEVED DURING: {source} milestone formally reached within {target} (e.g., final completion achieved during contract closeout).
verbGlossary.AWARDED DURING: {source} or notice to proceed formally granted to a contractor or supplier within {target} (e.g., award notice awarded during bidding & buyout).
verbGlossary.BOUND FROM: {source}coverage becomes effective at the start of {target} and remains in force through construction (e.g., builders risk bound from site setup).
verbGlossary.BUDGETED DURING: {source} allowance or provisional sum established in the budget during {target} (e.g., allowance budgeted during estimating & budgeting).
verbGlossary.CERTIFIED AFTER: {source} milestone formally certified upon satisfactory completion of {target} (e.g., substantial completion certified after punch list).
verbGlossary.CLOSED AT: {source} instrument formally concluded and all obligations discharged at {target} (e.g., prime contract closed at contract closeout).
verbGlossary.COMPILED DURING: {source}deliverables assembled and organized during {target} (e.g., closeout documents compiled during as-built documentation).
verbGlossary.CONDUCTED DURING: {source} qualification or screening process carried out within {target} (e.g., prequalification conducted during preconstruction planning).
verbGlossary.COVERED DURING: {source} or surety obligation provides protection throughout {target} (e.g., warranty covers defects discovered during seasonal commissioning).
verbGlossary.DEFINED DURING: {source} or contract requirements authored and finalized within {target} (e.g., scope of work defined during design development).
verbGlossary.ENABLES: {source} milestone unlocks {target} to begin (e.g., substantial completion enables facility transition).
verbGlossary.ENFORCED FROM: {source} terms become actively enforceable starting at {target} (e.g., general conditions enforced from site setup onward).
verbGlossary.ENFORCED THROUGH: {source} provision remains enforceable throughout and up to {target} (e.g., liquidated damages enforced through contract closeout).
verbGlossary.EVALUATED DURING: {source}formally reviewed and scored within {target} (e.g., bid evaluation performed during bidding & buyout).
verbGlossary.EXECUTED DURING: {source} instrument formally signed and made binding within {target} (e.g., prime contract executed during preconstruction planning).
verbGlossary.FULFILLED DURING: {source} deliveries received and accepted within {target} (e.g., purchase order fulfilled during material ordering & delivery).
verbGlossary.FURNISHED DURING: {source}provided by the contractor within {target} (e.g., performance bond furnished during bidding & buyout).
verbGlossary.ISSUED DURING: {source} document formally released to the market within {target} (e.g., RFP issued during bidding & buyout).
verbGlossary.LEVERAGED DURING: {source} provision used as leverage to compel performance within {target} (e.g., retainage terms leveraged during punch list to ensure defect correction).
verbGlossary.MEASURED AT: {source} calculated at the conclusion of {target} (e.g., change order rate measured at contract closeout).
verbGlossary.MEASURED DURING: {source} tracked and reported within {target} (e.g., bid coverage measured during bidding & buyout).
verbGlossary.NEGOTIATED DURING: {source} terms discussed and agreed upon within {target} (e.g., master service agreement negotiated during preconstruction planning).
verbGlossary.POSTED DURING: Bid security deposited as a condition of participation within {target} (e.g., bid bond posted during bidding & buyout).
verbGlossary.PROCURED FOR: {source} or purchase order executed in advance to secure materials or services needed for {target} (e.g., subcontract procured for fabrication & long-lead items).
verbGlossary.RECONCILED AT: {source} allowance or provisional sum reconciled against actual expenditures at {target} (e.g., allowance reconciled at contract closeout).
verbGlossary.REFINED DURING: {source}requirements clarified and adjusted based on submittals and shop drawing review within {target} (e.g., scope of work refined during submittals & shop drawings).
verbGlossary.RELEASED AT: {source}formally discharged at {target} (e.g., payment bond released at contract closeout).
verbGlossary.RELEASED DURING: {source} package or solicitation distributed to bidders within {target} (e.g., bid package released during bidding & buyout).
verbGlossary.REPORTED AT: {source}formally documented at {target} (e.g., diversity/DBE participation reported at contract closeout).
verbGlossary.SCOPED DURING: {source} or scope of work developed and defined within {target} (e.g., bid package scoped during estimating & budgeting).
verbGlossary.STIPULATED DURING: {source} labor or compliance requirement established as a bid condition within {target} (e.g., prevailing wage stipulated during bidding & buyout).
verbGlossary.SUBMITTED DURING: Bid, proposal, or closeout deliverable formally delivered within {target} (e.g., proposal/bid submitted during bidding & buyout).
verbGlossary.VERIFIED DURING: {source}documentation checked within {target} (e.g., insurance certificate verified during safety orientation).
verbGlossary.WARRANTED THROUGH: {source} or surety obligation extends through the duration of {target} (e.g., warranty warranted through warranty period).
